item.title: Flash USB Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Flash USB Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Flash USB Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Get cost effective USB flash drive recovery software from company website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org to rescue and restore inaccessible files stored at major brands of jump drives without requiring technical knowledge. Data revival tool easily revives damaged digital contents after being performing shift + Del keys operation.

[read more]
item.description:
Flash USB Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Get cost effective USB flash drive recovery software from company website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org to rescue and restore inaccessible files stored at major brands of jump drives without requiring technical knowledge. Data revival tool easily revives damaged digital contents after being performing shift + Del keys operation.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Flash USB Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Get cost effective USB flash drive recovery software from company website www.usbflashdriverecovery.org to rescue and restore inaccessible files stored at major brands of jump drives without requiring technical knowledge. Data revival tool easily revives damaged digital contents after being performing shift + Del keys operation.

[read more]

item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: qdvd [Video Apps]
item.itunes:title: qdvd [Video Apps]
item.itunes:author: tkbj
item.itunes:summary:
qdvd
(Video Apps)
qdvd is a GUI frontend for dvdauthor written in Qt5 (video DVD creator)
https://sourceforge.net/projects/qdvd
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qdvdauthor
http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:/tkb/

https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=qdvdauthor
https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=libffmpeg063
https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=ffmpeg063-libs

QDVDAuthor has been translated to Qt6 (version 2.4.1)
[read more]
item.description:
qdvd
(Video Apps)
qdvd is a GUI frontend for dvdauthor written in Qt5 (video DVD creator)
https://sourceforge.net/projects/qdvd
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qdvdauthor
http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:/tkb/

https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=libffmpeg063
https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=ffmpeg063-libs

QDVDAuthor has been translated to Qt6 (version 2.4.1)
[read more]

qdvd
(Video Apps)
qdvd is a GUI frontend for dvdauthor written in Qt5 (video DVD creator)
https://sourceforge.net/projects/qdvd

QDVDAuthor has been translated to Qt6 (version 2.4.1)

item.title: Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: twicsybuyins
item.itunes:summary:
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy
(Developers Apps)
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy: Boost Your Engagement and Build an Online Community
In today's digital age, social media has become an integral part of our lives. Platforms like Instagram have provided individuals and businesses with an incredible opportunity to connect, engage, and build communities. With millions of users active on Instagram every day, it is essential to stand out and make an impact on your target audience. One effective way to achieve this is by leveraging the power of Instagram comments. And with the emergence of platforms like Twicsy, buying Instagram comments has become a popular strategy to boost engagement and establish a strong online presence.

Instagram comments hold immense significance when it comes to enhancing your social media strategy. They serve as a key indicator of how your content is resonating with your audience and can significantly influence the visibility and credibility of your profile. Engaging comments not only attract more attention and interaction but also have the potential to convert casual viewers into loyal followers. However, getting a substantial number of comments organically can be a challenging task, especially for new or growing accounts.

This is precisely where Twicsy comes into play. Twicsy is a reputable platform that allows users to buy Instagram comments, enabling individuals and businesses to kickstart their Instagram journey or enhance their existing presence. By investing in buying comments from Twicsy, you can expedite your growth on Instagram and create a thriving community around your content.

One of the key advantages of buying Instagram comments from Twicsy is the immediate impact it can have on your account. While organic growth is undoubtedly valuable and should be pursued, it sometimes takes time to gain traction. By buying comments, you can jumpstart the engagement on your posts, attracting more attention from both new viewers and the Instagram algorithm. This increased engagement can lead to greater visibility, higher reach, and improved chances of creating a viral post.

Moreover, buying Instagram comments can also act as social proof for your account. When users come across a post with numerous comments, they tend to perceive it as more trustworthy and legitimate. This social proof can encourage others to join the conversation, further amplifying your engagement levels. Comments also foster a sense of community and encourage users to share their thoughts, opinions, and experiences related to your content. This interaction creates a valuable feedback loop, allowing you to understand your audience better and tailor your content to their preferences.

It is important to note that while buying Instagram comments can bring immediate benefits, it should be a part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy. To maximize the effectiveness of this approach, consider combining it with other organic growth tactics such as engaging with your audience, posting high-quality content regularly, and utilizing relevant hashtags. Combining these strategies will provide a holistic approach to your Instagram presence and ensure long-term success.

When considering buying Instagram comments from Twicsy or any other platform, it is crucial to prioritize quality over quantity. While you may be tempted to purchase a large number of comments at once, it is essential to ensure that the comments are authentic and relevant to your content. Generic or spammy comments can not only harm your credibility but also fail to foster meaningful engagement. Twicsy is known for providing genuine comments that align with your post, adding value to the conversation and attracting more interaction from real users.

In conclusion, buying Instagram comments from Twicsy can be an effective strategy to boost your engagement and build an online community. By leveraging the immediate impact, social proof, and community-building potential of comments, you can enhance your Instagram presence and connect with your target audience on a deeper level. However, it is important to use this approach as part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy, combining it with organic growth tactics and prioritizing quality over quantity. By embracing these strategies, you will have a strong foundation to thrive on Instagram and establish yourself as a reputable and influential presence in your niche.
Website: https://twicsy.com/buy-instagram-comments
Adress: District C1 Building, Office 209, World Trade Center, Dubai, UAE
Phone: 1 855-848-9812
Email: twicsybuyinstagramcomments@gmail.com
Tags: #twicsy #instagram #socialmedia #comments #instagramcomments #buyinstagramcomments
Googlesite: https://sites.google.com/view/twicsybuyinstagramcomments
Social:
https://about.me/BuyInstagramCommentTwicsy
https://www.reddit.com/user/BuyIgCommentsTwicsy/
https://500px.com/p/twicsybuyinstagramcomments?view=photos
https://umed.hys.cz/profile.php?lookup=1760
https://allauthor.com/profile/buyigcommentstwicsy/
[read more]
item.description:
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy
(Developers Apps)
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy: Boost Your Engagement and Build an Online Community
In today's digital age, social media has become an integral part of our lives. Platforms like Instagram have provided individuals and businesses with an incredible opportunity to connect, engage, and build communities. With millions of users active on Instagram every day, it is essential to stand out and make an impact on your target audience. One effective way to achieve this is by leveraging the power of Instagram comments. And with the emergence of platforms like Twicsy, buying Instagram comments has become a popular strategy to boost engagement and establish a strong online presence.

Instagram comments hold immense significance when it comes to enhancing your social media strategy. They serve as a key indicator of how your content is resonating with your audience and can significantly influence the visibility and credibility of your profile. Engaging comments not only attract more attention and interaction but also have the potential to convert casual viewers into loyal followers. However, getting a substantial number of comments organically can be a challenging task, especially for new or growing accounts.

This is precisely where Twicsy comes into play. Twicsy is a reputable platform that allows users to buy Instagram comments, enabling individuals and businesses to kickstart their Instagram journey or enhance their existing presence. By investing in buying comments from Twicsy, you can expedite your growth on Instagram and create a thriving community around your content.

One of the key advantages of buying Instagram comments from Twicsy is the immediate impact it can have on your account. While organic growth is undoubtedly valuable and should be pursued, it sometimes takes time to gain traction. By buying comments, you can jumpstart the engagement on your posts, attracting more attention from both new viewers and the Instagram algorithm. This increased engagement can lead to greater visibility, higher reach, and improved chances of creating a viral post.

Moreover, buying Instagram comments can also act as social proof for your account. When users come across a post with numerous comments, they tend to perceive it as more trustworthy and legitimate. This social proof can encourage others to join the conversation, further amplifying your engagement levels. Comments also foster a sense of community and encourage users to share their thoughts, opinions, and experiences related to your content. This interaction creates a valuable feedback loop, allowing you to understand your audience better and tailor your content to their preferences.

It is important to note that while buying Instagram comments can bring immediate benefits, it should be a part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy. To maximize the effectiveness of this approach, consider combining it with other organic growth tactics such as engaging with your audience, posting high-quality content regularly, and utilizing relevant hashtags. Combining these strategies will provide a holistic approach to your Instagram presence and ensure long-term success.

When considering buying Instagram comments from Twicsy or any other platform, it is crucial to prioritize quality over quantity. While you may be tempted to purchase a large number of comments at once, it is essential to ensure that the comments are authentic and relevant to your content. Generic or spammy comments can not only harm your credibility but also fail to foster meaningful engagement. Twicsy is known for providing genuine comments that align with your post, adding value to the conversation and attracting more interaction from real users.

In conclusion, buying Instagram comments from Twicsy can be an effective strategy to boost your engagement and build an online community. By leveraging the immediate impact, social proof, and community-building potential of comments, you can enhance your Instagram presence and connect with your target audience on a deeper level. However, it is important to use this approach as part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy, combining it with organic growth tactics and prioritizing quality over quantity. By embracing these strategies, you will have a strong foundation to thrive on Instagram and establish yourself as a reputable and influential presence in your niche.
Website: https://twicsy.com/buy-instagram-comments
Adress: District C1 Building, Office 209, World Trade Center, Dubai, UAE
Phone: 1 855-848-9812
Email: twicsybuyinstagramcomments@gmail.com
Tags: #twicsy #instagram #socialmedia #comments #instagramcomments #buyinstagramcomments
Googlesite: https://sites.google.com/view/twicsybuyinstagramcomments

item.content:encoded:
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy
(Developers Apps)
Buy Instagram Comments from Twicsy: Boost Your Engagement and Build an Online Community
In today's digital age, social media has become an integral part of our lives. Platforms like Instagram have provided individuals and businesses with an incredible opportunity to connect, engage, and build communities. With millions of users active on Instagram every day, it is essential to stand out and make an impact on your target audience. One effective way to achieve this is by leveraging the power of Instagram comments. And with the emergence of platforms like Twicsy, buying Instagram comments has become a popular strategy to boost engagement and establish a strong online presence.

Instagram comments hold immense significance when it comes to enhancing your social media strategy. They serve as a key indicator of how your content is resonating with your audience and can significantly influence the visibility and credibility of your profile. Engaging comments not only attract more attention and interaction but also have the potential to convert casual viewers into loyal followers. However, getting a substantial number of comments organically can be a challenging task, especially for new or growing accounts.

This is precisely where Twicsy comes into play. Twicsy is a reputable platform that allows users to buy Instagram comments, enabling individuals and businesses to kickstart their Instagram journey or enhance their existing presence. By investing in buying comments from Twicsy, you can expedite your growth on Instagram and create a thriving community around your content.

One of the key advantages of buying Instagram comments from Twicsy is the immediate impact it can have on your account. While organic growth is undoubtedly valuable and should be pursued, it sometimes takes time to gain traction. By buying comments, you can jumpstart the engagement on your posts, attracting more attention from both new viewers and the Instagram algorithm. This increased engagement can lead to greater visibility, higher reach, and improved chances of creating a viral post.

Moreover, buying Instagram comments can also act as social proof for your account. When users come across a post with numerous comments, they tend to perceive it as more trustworthy and legitimate. This social proof can encourage others to join the conversation, further amplifying your engagement levels. Comments also foster a sense of community and encourage users to share their thoughts, opinions, and experiences related to your content. This interaction creates a valuable feedback loop, allowing you to understand your audience better and tailor your content to their preferences.

It is important to note that while buying Instagram comments can bring immediate benefits, it should be a part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy. To maximize the effectiveness of this approach, consider combining it with other organic growth tactics such as engaging with your audience, posting high-quality content regularly, and utilizing relevant hashtags. Combining these strategies will provide a holistic approach to your Instagram presence and ensure long-term success.

When considering buying Instagram comments from Twicsy or any other platform, it is crucial to prioritize quality over quantity. While you may be tempted to purchase a large number of comments at once, it is essential to ensure that the comments are authentic and relevant to your content. Generic or spammy comments can not only harm your credibility but also fail to foster meaningful engagement. Twicsy is known for providing genuine comments that align with your post, adding value to the conversation and attracting more interaction from real users.

In conclusion, buying Instagram comments from Twicsy can be an effective strategy to boost your engagement and build an online community. By leveraging the immediate impact, social proof, and community-building potential of comments, you can enhance your Instagram presence and connect with your target audience on a deeper level. However, it is important to use this approach as part of a comprehensive Instagram strategy, combining it with organic growth tactics and prioritizing quality over quantity. By embracing these strategies, you will have a strong foundation to thrive on Instagram and establish yourself as a reputable and influential presence in your niche.

item.title: RadioTray bookmarks [Radio Apps]
item.itunes:title: RadioTray bookmarks [Radio Apps]
item.itunes:author: gui-os
item.itunes:summary:
RadioTray bookmarks
(Radio Apps)
UPDATED STATE
added nu systray icons for radiotray with instructions.

As the main title, custom bookmarks to replace the default ones, with instructions.
I uploaded as well, several m3u radio streams playlists from many servers to complement your musical taste with radiotray.
To install radiotray (in debian arch)
sudo apt install radiotray python-xdg
Its possible to install in others distros but i didnt tested.
[read more]
item.description:
RadioTray bookmarks
(Radio Apps)
UPDATED STATE
added nu systray icons for radiotray with instructions.

As the main title, custom bookmarks to replace the default ones, with instructions.
I uploaded as well, several m3u radio streams playlists from many servers to complement your musical taste with radiotray.
To install radiotray (in debian arch)
sudo apt install radiotray python-xdg
Its possible to install in others distros but i didnt tested.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RadioTray bookmarks
(Radio Apps)
UPDATED STATE
added nu systray icons for radiotray with instructions.

As the main title, custom bookmarks to replace the default ones, with instructions.
I uploaded as well, several m3u radio streams playlists from many servers to complement your musical taste with radiotray.
To install radiotray (in debian arch)
sudo apt install radiotray python-xdg
Its possible to install in others distros but i didnt tested.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: eSIM Plus [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: eSIM Plus [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: esimplus
item.itunes:summary:
eSIM Plus
(Utilities)
Best Mobile Internet Provider For Traveling and Virtual Phone Numbers For SMS & Calls
eSIM Plus is the ultimate solution for your mobile internet needs, offering virtual phone numbers and a wide range of features. Powered by embedded SIM card (eSIM) technology, you can access the internet effortlessly, enjoy a secure and stable Internet connection, and benefit from the widest global coverage. Say goodbye to the limitations of traditional physical SIM cards and embrace the next-generation solution: eSIM Plus!

Here‘s why eSIM Plus is the best choice:

– Cost-effectiveness: eSIM Plus offers data plans at a fair price, making it a far more advantageous solution compared to roaming;

– Effortless Management: purchase an unlimited number of eSIM profiles and manage them easily within your account;

– Versatile Virtual Phone Numbers: get as many as you want, make international phone calls, exchange messages, and set up social media accounts — all that while remaining completely anonymous!

– Global Coverage: get a seamless Internet connection and virtual phone number in every corner of the world;

– Synchronized Device Integration: whenever you log in on another phone, you won’t lose any data;

– Privacy Protection & Anonymity: Safeguard your privacy and reduce the risk of unwanted contacts or spam messages with Virtual Numbers;

– Hassle-free Installation: just a few taps, and you’re good to go;

– Flexible Data Plans To Suit All Tastes & Budgets: buy mobile data to use in one, two, or multiple countries – or even on an entire continent;

– No Additional SIM Cards: all the acquired data plans and profiles are available on one eSIM card. Switch effortlessly between mobile carriers and virtual numbers;

– No Contracts Or Long-term Commitments. Cancel anytime!


Your Ticket To Unlimited Opportunities

With eSIM Plus, your current location is of no significance, since you’re free to choose either separate data plans or virtual numbers for over 133 countries or opt for an all-in-one plan for any continent/region. eSIM Plus has established itself as a must-have app that caters to your business and personal needs alike.

For any assistance or feedback, our dedicated support team is just a click away. Contact us at support.esim@appvillis.com, and we'll be thrilled to assist you.

Privacy Policy: http://esimplus.me/privacy

Terms of Use: https://esimplus.me/terms
[read more]
item.description:
eSIM Plus
(Utilities)
Best Mobile Internet Provider For Traveling and Virtual Phone Numbers For SMS & Calls
eSIM Plus is the ultimate solution for your mobile internet needs, offering virtual phone numbers and a wide range of features. Powered by embedded SIM card (eSIM) technology, you can access the internet effortlessly, enjoy a secure and stable Internet connection, and benefit from the widest global coverage. Say goodbye to the limitations of traditional physical SIM cards and embrace the next-generation solution: eSIM Plus!

Here‘s why eSIM Plus is the best choice:

– Cost-effectiveness: eSIM Plus offers data plans at a fair price, making it a far more advantageous solution compared to roaming;

– Effortless Management: purchase an unlimited number of eSIM profiles and manage them easily within your account;

– Versatile Virtual Phone Numbers: get as many as you want, make international phone calls, exchange messages, and set up social media accounts — all that while remaining completely anonymous!

– Global Coverage: get a seamless Internet connection and virtual phone number in every corner of the world;

– Synchronized Device Integration: whenever you log in on another phone, you won’t lose any data;

– Privacy Protection & Anonymity: Safeguard your privacy and reduce the risk of unwanted contacts or spam messages with Virtual Numbers;

– Hassle-free Installation: just a few taps, and you’re good to go;

– Flexible Data Plans To Suit All Tastes & Budgets: buy mobile data to use in one, two, or multiple countries – or even on an entire continent;

– No Additional SIM Cards: all the acquired data plans and profiles are available on one eSIM card. Switch effortlessly between mobile carriers and virtual numbers;

– No Contracts Or Long-term Commitments. Cancel anytime!


Your Ticket To Unlimited Opportunities

With eSIM Plus, your current location is of no significance, since you’re free to choose either separate data plans or virtual numbers for over 133 countries or opt for an all-in-one plan for any continent/region. eSIM Plus has established itself as a must-have app that caters to your business and personal needs alike.

For any assistance or feedback, our dedicated support team is just a click away. Contact us at support.esim@appvillis.com, and we'll be thrilled to assist you.

Privacy Policy: http://esimplus.me/privacy

Terms of Use: https://esimplus.me/terms
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eSIM Plus
(Utilities)
Best Mobile Internet Provider For Traveling and Virtual Phone Numbers For SMS & Calls
eSIM Plus is the ultimate solution for your mobile internet needs, offering virtual phone numbers and a wide range of features. Powered by embedded SIM card (eSIM) technology, you can access the internet effortlessly, enjoy a secure and stable Internet connection, and benefit from the widest global coverage. Say goodbye to the limitations of traditional physical SIM cards and embrace the next-generation solution: eSIM Plus!

Here‘s why eSIM Plus is the best choice:

– Cost-effectiveness: eSIM Plus offers data plans at a fair price, making it a far more advantageous solution compared to roaming;

– Effortless Management: purchase an unlimited number of eSIM profiles and manage them easily within your account;

– Versatile Virtual Phone Numbers: get as many as you want, make international phone calls, exchange messages, and set up social media accounts — all that while remaining completely anonymous!

– Global Coverage: get a seamless Internet connection and virtual phone number in every corner of the world;

– Synchronized Device Integration: whenever you log in on another phone, you won’t lose any data;

– Privacy Protection & Anonymity: Safeguard your privacy and reduce the risk of unwanted contacts or spam messages with Virtual Numbers;

– Hassle-free Installation: just a few taps, and you’re good to go;

– Flexible Data Plans To Suit All Tastes & Budgets: buy mobile data to use in one, two, or multiple countries – or even on an entire continent;

– No Additional SIM Cards: all the acquired data plans and profiles are available on one eSIM card. Switch effortlessly between mobile carriers and virtual numbers;

– No Contracts Or Long-term Commitments. Cancel anytime!


Your Ticket To Unlimited Opportunities

With eSIM Plus, your current location is of no significance, since you’re free to choose either separate data plans or virtual numbers for over 133 countries or opt for an all-in-one plan for any continent/region. eSIM Plus has established itself as a must-have app that caters to your business and personal needs alike.

For any assistance or feedback, our dedicated support team is just a click away. Contact us at support.esim@appvillis.com, and we'll be thrilled to assist you.

Privacy Policy: http://esimplus.me/privacy

Terms of Use: https://esimplus.me/terms
[read more]

item.title: Nicegram [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Nicegram [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: nicegram
item.itunes:summary:
Nicegram
(Chat & Messenging)
The all-in-one Telegram client elevating your conversations!

Nicegram: Where messaging perfection meets professionalism. Immerse yourself in a secure and feature-rich Telegram client that makes your favorite messenger even more powerful, improved and AI-enhanced than ever before! From advanced features to AI assistance, we've meticulously crafted an app that surpasses expectations.

With a strong focus on privacy and security, Nicegram seamlessly incorporates Telegram's cutting-edge data encryption technologies to ensure your conversations remain secure and confidential.

Offering an exceptional range of features، tailored to enhance your messaging experience:

– Unlimited Accounts: Manage multiple Telegram accounts effortlessly, keeping your personal and professional communications separate and organized.

– AI Assistance: Let our intelligent virtual assistant streamline your messaging experience. Enjoy smart suggestions, unique text & image generation, and advanced equations' solutions.

– User Identity Management: Take control of your online presence with our Double Bottom, Nameless, View Registration Date and Show ID features. Whether you seek privacy or desire deeper insights, Nicegram provides the tools you need to shape your digital identity.

– Advanced Text Features: With Quick Replies, Built-in Translator, Instant Forward to Saved Messages, Nicegram Folders, and the ability to Hide Reactions, you have the power to streamline your messaging experience, save time, and personalize your interactions like never before.

– Bulk Actions: Boost your productivity with the ability to select and manage multiple messages simultaneously. Mention all users, archive, delete, or forward messages in bulk, making tedious tasks a breeze.

Nicegram is a cross-cultural community where you can participate in discussions, connect with like-minded people, explore educational content, and impact the messenger’s future. Unlock the full potential of Nicegram's premium tools such as AI Assistance, Mention All, and Built-in Translator with simple in-app purchases. Download now and experience messaging like never before!

Join our vibrant community and dive into the heart of our project's mission! Visit our website at https://nicegram.app/, and connect with us on GitHub https://github.com/Nicegram or Telegram https://t.me/nicegramapp to find out more. For further information visit our Wiki at https://wiki.nicegram.app.

For any assistance or feedback, our dedicated support team is just a click away. Contact us at nicegram@appvillis.com, and we'll be thrilled to assist you.

Privacy Policy: https://appvillis.com/nicegram-privacy.html

Terms of Use: https://appvillis.com/eula.html
[read more]
item.description:
Nicegram
(Chat & Messenging)
The all-in-one Telegram client elevating your conversations!

Nicegram: Where messaging perfection meets professionalism. Immerse yourself in a secure and feature-rich Telegram client that makes your favorite messenger even more powerful, improved and AI-enhanced than ever before! From advanced features to AI assistance, we've meticulously crafted an app that surpasses expectations.

With a strong focus on privacy and security, Nicegram seamlessly incorporates Telegram's cutting-edge data encryption technologies to ensure your conversations remain secure and confidential.

Offering an exceptional range of features، tailored to enhance your messaging experience:

– Unlimited Accounts: Manage multiple Telegram accounts effortlessly, keeping your personal and professional communications separate and organized.

– AI Assistance: Let our intelligent virtual assistant streamline your messaging experience. Enjoy smart suggestions, unique text & image generation, and advanced equations' solutions.

– User Identity Management: Take control of your online presence with our Double Bottom, Nameless, View Registration Date and Show ID features. Whether you seek privacy or desire deeper insights, Nicegram provides the tools you need to shape your digital identity.

– Advanced Text Features: With Quick Replies, Built-in Translator, Instant Forward to Saved Messages, Nicegram Folders, and the ability to Hide Reactions, you have the power to streamline your messaging experience, save time, and personalize your interactions like never before.

– Bulk Actions: Boost your productivity with the ability to select and manage multiple messages simultaneously. Mention all users, archive, delete, or forward messages in bulk, making tedious tasks a breeze.

Nicegram is a cross-cultural community where you can participate in discussions, connect with like-minded people, explore educational content, and impact the messenger’s future. Unlock the full potential of Nicegram's premium tools such as AI Assistance, Mention All, and Built-in Translator with simple in-app purchases. Download now and experience messaging like never before!

Join our vibrant community and dive into the heart of our project's mission! Visit our website at https://nicegram.app/, and connect with us on GitHub https://github.com/Nicegram or Telegram https://t.me/nicegramapp to find out more. For further information visit our Wiki at https://wiki.nicegram.app.

For any assistance or feedback, our dedicated support team is just a click away. Contact us at nicegram@appvillis.com, and we'll be thrilled to assist you.

Nicegram
(Chat & Messenging)
The all-in-one Telegram client elevating your conversations!

Nicegram: Where messaging perfection meets professionalism. Immerse yourself in a secure and feature-rich Telegram client that makes your favorite messenger even more powerful, improved and AI-enhanced than ever before! From advanced features to AI assistance, we've meticulously crafted an app that surpasses expectations.

With a strong focus on privacy and security, Nicegram seamlessly incorporates Telegram's cutting-edge data encryption technologies to ensure your conversations remain secure and confidential.

Offering an exceptional range of features، tailored to enhance your messaging experience:

– Unlimited Accounts: Manage multiple Telegram accounts effortlessly, keeping your personal and professional communications separate and organized.

– User Identity Management: Take control of your online presence with our Double Bottom, Nameless, View Registration Date and Show ID features. Whether you seek privacy or desire deeper insights, Nicegram provides the tools you need to shape your digital identity.

– Advanced Text Features: With Quick Replies, Built-in Translator, Instant Forward to Saved Messages, Nicegram Folders, and the ability to Hide Reactions, you have the power to streamline your messaging experience, save time, and personalize your interactions like never before.
